title: Isabel's Aeroscapes [for Create Aeronautics]
description: Totally immersive sky island survival for Create: Aeronautics.
body:
![Logo image for Isabel's Aeroscapes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce3f03759d145cf153f40648f46e272502fa46e8_0.webp)
☁️ The ULTIMATE modpack for Create: Aeronautics is finally here! ☁️

![A hamlet and keep atop a heavily wooded island.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/098e60ed7efb482226435f5fa2ea3f6233b608f4_0.webp) # Features All of the mods in this pack are heavily configured to provide an accessible, balanced, and immersive experience. Check the full modlist for more details. > 🛩️ **Create: Aeronautics**! > > 🏝️ Beautiful **floating islands world generation**! > > 🌱 **150+** biomes to explore! > > 🏺 Vanilla-friendly **ruins**! > > 🌽 Dozens of new **crops**! > > 🐤 Immersive **wildlife**! > > 🪁 **Gliders, Grappling Hooks,** and more! > > 🎶 Immersive **sound overhaul!** > > 💽 Original music by **Elephants!**

# Installation Guide 1. Download the latest release. 2. Download and install a Minecraft launcher of your choice. You can use the [Modrinth app](https://modrinth.com/app), or a third-party one like **[MultiMC](https://multimc.org/)** or **[PrismLauncher](https://prismlauncher.org/)**. 3. For the official Modrinth app, check out [this support page](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8802250-modpacks-on-modrinth). The rest of these instructions are for either of the other listed launchers! 4. Ensure you have **Java 21+.** If you don’t, or you’re not sure, download it from [Oracle](https://www.oracle.com/java/technologies/downloads/#jdk17-windows) and install it. 5. Make sure that your launcher of choice is using **Java 21+** by either pointing it at your Java executable during setup, or going to Settings > Java and pointing the Java Path at your Java executable. 6. In your launcher's settings, make sure the **max RAM** is high enough; 4096MB should be more than enough. 7. In your launcher, click the **Add Instance** button in the top left. 8. Select the **Import from zip** option in the left menu. 9. Select **Browse** and open the .mrpack file for _Isabel’s Aeroscapes_ that you downloaded. If you don't see it, you might have to set the file type in the browse window to ".mrpack". 10. After import has completed, **double-click** the new instance that was just created to launch. **Done!**

![A swampy island floating in a sea of clouds.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81324d0466f2d1ad2a7ec0a7f07109655794e3ac_0.webp) ![An island forested by pink trees.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d17595897e77738f195c4fa6f789bf521c85e7a8_0.webp) # FAQ ❓ **Can this pack be used in multiplayer?** > Absolutely! Check out [this support page](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8802250-modpacks-on-modrinth) for more info. ❓ **Are there any vanilla features missing from this pack?** > The only missing features are certain structures that are incompatible with Aeroscapes world generation, like oceans and Ocean Monuments. I plan on adding alternative methods for getting the blocks and items exclusive to these structures in a future update. Elytra and some modded items have been intentionally removed for balance. ❓ **Will this pack be updated to newer Minecraft versions?** > The pack is on 1.21.1, the only version of the game that Create: Aeronautics is compatible with at the time of writing. This pack will be updated to new versions of the game by popular demand only :) ❓ **Can I make the islands further apart?** > Yes! Try Stardust Labs' [Continents](https://modrinth.com/datapack/continents) pack and use the Large Biomes preset. ❓ **Whoa, my performance is terrible!** > Hey, that's not a question! First, make sure your launcher has enough RAM. The default configuration is usually not enough. Then try disabling shaders, then LambDynamicLights, then Sound Physics Remastered: those are the most performance-impacting mods in the pack. ❓ **What's next for the pack?** > The next step for this pack is to incorporate feedback from players and improve the generator as I work to integrate a lightweight FTB quest integration into the pack.

![A dark biome with huge mushrooms fades in from the mist.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1aee2683d5043237ef3f2d48a4c4a5636099422b_0.webp) ![Aurora over a snowy landscape.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7290aa242a755cdb86465b0e534eab3eb0df7cc8_0.webp) # Full Modlist [Check out the full modlist here!](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1SKyB9fq3d2gQKRQDqwA_aeV1i_z3ZsX8FmHeCFMy-vM/edit?gid=0#gid=0) It's recommended to also grab [Stay True](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true) for a massive (but faithful!) enhancement to the vanilla visuals.

![A clouded jungle with massive pillars of vine-covered stone.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/606b86b862e87ab77a9b13f1e6b8cbf2b01b6b78_0.webp) # External Links 🎼 [Elephants, composer of the original music disc _yaw_](https://elephants2.bandcamp.com/) 💽 [Unofficial Aeroscapes OST](https://open.spotify.com/playlist/57ZopEcldrOVKg0dBOSYf3?si=08838279ae8e4d38) 🎮 [My other projects](https://nuclearobelisk.itch.io/) ☕ [My Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/nuclearobelisk)
